competencies.name: Hardware Accelerator Architecture
competencies.description: Design and evaluation of specialized physical computing structures tailored for machine learning execution.
example_tasks: Evaluate arithmetic intensity and memory bandwidth bounds for a proposed ASIC design.
Analyze warp divergence impact on SIMT execution for a specific neural network layer.

competencies.name: Distributed Training Strategies
competencies.description: Orchestration of multi-node model training utilizing advanced parallelism and communication overlap techniques.
example_tasks: Design a 3D parallelism strategy for a trillion-parameter model to minimize memory footprint.
Optimize gradient synchronization by overlapping computation with ring-allreduce operations.

competencies.name: Memory and Storage Management
competencies.description: Optimization of data access patterns, caching strategies, and storage hierarchies to prevent input-output bottlenecks.
example_tasks: Implement a paged memory management system to handle dynamic KV cache allocation.
Configure GPU direct storage and NVMe caching to resolve dataloader I/O walls.

competencies.name: Data Engineering and Pipelines
competencies.description: Construction of robust, scalable data ingestion and transformation systems resilient to drift and distribution shifts.
example_tasks: Architect a stream ingestion pipeline with idempotent transformations for real-time model updates.
Implement monitoring for concept drift and label quality degradation in production datasets.

competencies.name: Model Serving and Optimization
competencies.description: Deployment of high-throughput, low-latency inference services with efficient batching and resource allocation.
example_tasks: Tune dynamic batching windows to optimize the trade-off between throughput and latency.
Deploy a disaggregated serving architecture utilizing prefill-decode decomposition.

competencies.name: Model Compression and Quantization
competencies.description: Reduction of model memory footprint and computational requirements while preserving predictive performance.
example_tasks: Apply AWQ quantization to reduce the memory footprint of a large language model.
Implement QLoRA for efficient fine-tuning of a foundational model on consumer hardware.

competencies.name: Frameworks and Compilation
competencies.description: Utilization of deep learning compilers and execution graphs to accelerate computational workloads.
example_tasks: Refactor eager execution code into static computation graphs using ahead-of-time compilation.
Profile and optimize a model using operator fusion and CUDA graphs to minimize kernel launch overhead.

competencies.name: Network Fabrics and Interconnects
competencies.description: Design and configuration of high-bandwidth cluster topologies and routing protocols for distributed ML workloads.
example_tasks: Calculate the required bisection bandwidth for a fat-tree topology supporting 10,000 GPUs.
Configure adaptive routing and congestion control (DCQCN) on a RoCE v2 network.

competencies.name: Fault Tolerance and Reliability
competencies.description: Implementation of resilient systems capable of sustaining training and inference despite hardware or network failures.
example_tasks: Design an asynchronous distributed checkpointing system to minimize training interruptions.
Simulate correlated failures using fault injection to test cluster recovery mechanisms.

competencies.name: Cluster Orchestration and Scheduling
competencies.description: Management of multi-tenant compute clusters through advanced scheduling algorithms and resource bin-packing.
example_tasks: Implement gang scheduling to ensure all workers for a distributed training job launch simultaneously.
Optimize hardware utilization using bin-packing heuristics and Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) allocations.

competencies.name: ML Operations and Benchmarking
competencies.description: Lifecycle management of ML models including automated deployment, rigorous evaluation, and continuous monitoring.
example_tasks: Set up a canary deployment pipeline to safely roll out a new recommendation model.
Detect silent model failures through telemetry aggregation and automated benchmark validation.

competencies.name: Security, Privacy, and Robustness
competencies.description: Protection of ML systems against adversarial threats, data poisoning, and unauthorized model extraction.
example_tasks: Implement differential privacy techniques during training to prevent membership inference attacks.
Harden a deployed computer vision model against adversarial inputs using adversarial training.

competencies.name: Fairness and Responsible AI
competencies.description: Auditing and mitigation of systemic biases to ensure equitable, transparent, and accountable model behavior.
example_tasks: Conduct a disaggregated evaluation to identify performance disparities across demographic subgroups.
Draft comprehensive model cards and datasheets for datasets prior to a production release.

competencies.name: Edge AI and TinyML
competencies.description: Adaptation and deployment of machine learning algorithms on severely resource-constrained endpoint devices.
example_tasks: Optimize a keyword spotting model using TFLite for deployment on a microcontroller.
Design a federated learning architecture for mobile devices incorporating secure aggregation.

competencies.name: Sustainable AI and Efficiency
competencies.description: Measurement and reduction of the carbon footprint and energy consumption of machine learning workloads.
example_tasks: Calculate the total lifecycle carbon accounting (embodied and operational) for a large-scale training run.
Utilize the energy roofline model to identify power bottlenecks in an inference pipeline.
